original_content: tried using deadpool for redis today. lifetime errors everywhere. spent 3 hours debugging. finally got it working by using Arc instead of references. should document this pattern.

interesting idea from that paper - spaced repetition intervals follow exponential curve. 1 day, 3 days, 1 week, 2 weeks, 1 month. seems to match human forgetting curve. could optimize review scheduling algorithm.
meeting notes: discussed new API design. consensus on REST over GraphQL for simplicity. versioning via url path. need to add rate limiting and proper error codes. john will handle auth middleware.

docker networking issue - containers couldnt talk to each other. problem was using wrong network mode. switched to bridge and added them to same network. works now. need to remember: docker network inspect shows all the details.

tdd workflow feels slow at first but pays off. write test, watch it fail, implement, refactor. the test suite gives confidence to change things. caught 2 bugs today that would have reached production.
query taking 4 seconds on users table. explain showed no index on email column. added index, down to 50ms. lesson: always explain slow queries before optimizing.
zettelkasten method seems promising. atomic notes with links. each note one idea. use unique ids. write in own words forces understanding. need to be disciplined about creating links.
error handling in rust: Result for recoverable, panic for bugs. ? operator is game changer. anyhow for apps, thiserror for libraries. avoid unwrap in prod code. map_err to add context.
microservices talk to each other via rest or message queues. rest for immediate response, queue for async. kafka good for event sourcing. need circuit breakers and retries for resilience.
code review checklist: logic correct? edge cases handled? tests adequate? performance ok? security issues? maintainable? keep prs small, under 400 lines. automate style stuff with linters.

vector db for semantic search. embeddings from sentence transformers. store in qdrant. query returns similar docs. way better than keyword search for finding related notes. need to experiment with different embedding models.

ci pipeline: commit -> build -> test -> deploy staging -> integration tests -> deploy prod. cache dependencies for speed. parallel jobs when possible. fail fast on errors. whole pipeline under 10 min.
rate limiting with token bucket algorithm. allows bursts but limits sustained rate. return 429 with retry-after header. implement on both client and server. client should backoff exponentially.
observability: metrics (prometheus), logs (elk), traces (jaeger). instrument with opentelemetry. track request rate, errors, latency percentiles. alert on slos. distributed tracing shows bottlenecks.
auth: jwt for stateless api auth. oauth2 for third party. session cookies for web apps. always https. hash passwords with bcrypt. rotate tokens. implement rbac. add mfa for sensitive ops.
